title: ZOPPER Magic Sponge Eraser 2 Pack - Extra Durable Cleaning Pads, 4X Stronger Stain Remover for Multi-Surface Use - Wall, Kitchen, Bathroom, Shoes & More, Removes Dirt, Grime | Size 12.1x6.6x2.2cm
features: 4X Durable Melamine Foam – Special high-density foam resists tearing for long-lasting use. Outperforms standard sponges in tough cleaning jobs.
Multi-Surface Cleaning – Effortlessly removes grease, grime and scuffs from kitchens, bathrooms, walls, shoes, cars and more. Ideal on ceramic, glass, porcelain, plastic, wood and painted surfaces.
Stubborn Mark Remover – Gentle abrasive texture lifts pen marks, crayon scribbles and scuff stains without hard scrubbing. Just wet with water – no bleach or harsh chemicals needed.
Ergonomic Comfort Grip – Lightweight rectangular design fits comfortably in the hand for easy scrubbing. Rounded edges reach into corners and grooves without slipping, reducing fatigue on big jobs.
Washable & Eco-Friendly – Simply rinse and squeeze to refresh the sponge after each use. Made from non-toxic, chemical-free melamine foam for odorless, eco-conscious cleaning.
